lines.text: Tennis | Walt Disney World Resort
Tennis
MultipleWalt Disney World® Resortlocations
Slam your way through a game, set and match at tennis courts found at 7 Walt Disney World Resort hotels.
All Ages
Raise a Racquet

Take "advantage" of any of several illuminated courts you'll "love" playing on—whatever your skill level! Play the French way on clay courts at Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa, hit balls around on hard courts or try your hand at pickleball—available at select Resort hotels!

Courts are available on a first-come, first-served basis and are generally accessible from 9:00 AM to 10:00 PM—though hours may vary by location and courts may occasionally be booked for lessons or events. Appropriate tennis attire and shoes are required.

Any Guest of a Walt Disney World Resort hotel may access the tennis courts, and equipment can be obtained using your MagicBand or a valid Resort ID. Disney Vacation Club members may check out equipment free of charge; for all other Guests, an associated fee applies.
Courts are found at the following locations:

Disney's Contemporary Resort and Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort — One (1) court adjacent to Bay Lake Tower; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Community Hall or Boat Nook Marina
Disney's Animal Kingdom Villas - Kidani Village — Two (2) hard courts located near the shuffleboard and basketball courts; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Community Hall
Disney's Boardwalk Inn and Villas — Two (2) courts adjacent to Community Hall; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Community Hall
The Campsites and Cabins at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort – Two (2) hard courts located at the Meadow Recreation Area; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at the Bike Barn
Disney's Old Key West Resort — Two (2) courts near the main pool and one (1) on Old Turtle Pond Road; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at Conch Flats Community Hall or Hank’s Rent ‘N Return
Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa — Two (2) clay courts located in the sports courts area; check out equipment at Community Hall or Horsing Around Rentals
Disney's Yacht and Beach Club Resorts — One (1) court located near Admiral Pool; check out tennis and pickleball equipment at the Disney Yacht Club Front Desk.
Tennis Lessons
Elevate your game with clinics taught by tennis pros and tailored to your playing ability.
Group and private lessons are available at the following Disney Resort hotels:
Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort
Disney's Animal Kingdom Lodge
Disney's BoardWalk Inn
Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa
Disney's Yacht & Beach Club Resorts
To arrange for individual or group instruction, call Orlando Tennis at (321) 228-1146. Guests under age 18 must have parent or guardian permission to call.
